en: ♪ But I got better since you got gone. ♪
♪ I'm still a few too many on a Friday night. ♪
ko: 아직 금요일 밤에 좀 과하긴 하지만.

en: ♪ Still try to step in when it ain't my fight. ♪
ko: 내 싸움이 아닌데도 끼어들려 하고, 오해하지 마.

en: ♪ I'm still me, don't get me wrong. ♪
♪ But I got better since you got gone. ♪
♪ Swear it was like I've been damned. ♪ ♪ I'm finally back to being who I am. ♪
ko: 저주받은 것 같았지만, 나 자신이 되는 법을 찾았어.

en: ♪ We were over it but so was the night. ♪
♪ Light came on, it all felt right when it all went wrong. ♪
ko: 불이 켜졌고, 모든 게 잘못됐을 때 모든 게 맞는 것처럼 느껴졌어.

en: ♪ You turned me loose, wasn't no telling who I'd turn into. ♪
ko: 넌 나를 풀어줬어, 뭐가 될지 알기 전까진 못 일어났지.

en: ♪ But it turns out me and you together's why it took so long. ♪
ko: 결국 너와 내가 함께였기에 그렇게 오래 걸린 거였어.

en: ♪ Cause I got better since you got gone. ♪
